svg.title: how savings stack toward 95 percent
svg.desc: Bars showing input cost per request for an agentic workload: full price 100 percent, with caching about 19 percent, with caching plus batch about 9.5 percent, leaving roughly 90 percent saved before any quality lever is touched.

g.text: input cost per request, agentic workload, 90% of tokens in a stable prefix
~19% (cached 90% of bytes at one tenth price)
both levers leave the model, the prompt, and the output untouched.
quality levers (rerouting, compaction) only matter for the last few points.
